course.title: Lesson 49: The End of a Dream

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Tired of sleeping on the floor, a young man in Tehran saved up for years to buy a real bed.

translations.zh-Hans: 德黑兰的一个年轻人厌倦了睡地板，多年积蓄后终于买了一张真正的床。

segments.text: For the first time in his life, he became the proud owner of a bed which had springs and a mattress.

translations.zh-Hans: 他生平第一次自豪地拥有了一张带弹簧和床垫的床。

segments.text: Because the weather was very hot, he carried the bed on to the roof of his house.

translations.zh-Hans: 因为天气很热，他把床搬到了自家屋顶上。

segments.text: He slept very well for the first two nights, but on the third night, a storm blew up.

translations.zh-Hans: 头两个晚上他睡得很好，但第三天夜里刮起了暴风雨。

segments.text: A gust of wind swept the bed off the roof and sent it crashing into the courtyard below.

translations.zh-Hans: 一阵狂风把床从屋顶卷走，重重地摔进下面的院子。

segments.text: The young man did not wake up until the bed had struck the ground.

translations.zh-Hans: 直到床撞到地面，年轻人才醒来。

segments.text: Although the bed was smashed to pieces, the man was miraculously unhurt.

translations.zh-Hans: 床虽然摔得粉碎，那人却奇迹般地毫发无伤。

segments.text: When he woke up, he was still on the mattress.

translations.zh-Hans: 醒来时，他仍躺在床垫上。

segments.text: Glancing at the bits of wood and metal that lay around him, the man sadly picked up the mattress and carried it into his house.

translations.zh-Hans: 他看了一眼散落在周围的木头和金属碎片，伤心地拿起床垫，搬进屋里。

segments.text: After he had put it on the floor, he promptly went to sleep again.

translations.zh-Hans: 把床垫放在地板上后，他很快又睡着了。
